work_item: IR-B = IR-1 Phase 2 (CODE) — Evidence Recall@K measure + gold-set schema (corpus-independent half)
note_on_merge: NOT merged. Orchestrator brings this branch back via codex §9 + merge ONLY AFTER the 0.8.0 GA tag.

evidence_unit: locator{kind: span|whole_body} (provenance, NOT load-bearing in a non-chunking store)
gold_set_schema_summary.denominator_rule: ONE unit of relevance per query (§f seed): required_evidence(necessity=required) when present; else expected_top_k_doc_ids map exactly once to degenerate whole-body required units (eu8 reduction fallback). Never both.
gold_set_schema_summary.measure: Evidence Recall@K: strict all-of (headline) + graded fraction, SAME required-only denominator; supporting in NEITHER recall number (separate supporting-coverage); negative=abstention-correctness (false-positive rate), kept OUT of the recall mean.
gold_set_schema_summary.vector_fanout: raised to >= deepest K via set_search_limit_for_test (measurement-harness only)
gold_set_schema_summary.pinning_principle: corpus_hash + qrels_version recorded + validated; fixture carries TODO(COR-2-freeze) placeholder (flagged un-pinned).

runnable_now.rerank_stub: rerank_fused identity seam (aspirational/report-only until a real reranker)

deferred_TODO_COR2_freeze.fts_write_cursor: production FTS MATCH branch (write-cursor order) — needs harness FTS5 SQL + frozen corpus
deferred_TODO_COR2_freeze.bm25_fts: BM25-ranked FTS-only baseline (ORDER BY bm25() ASC) — needs harness FTS5 SQL + frozen corpus

deferred_on_COR2_freeze: real fact-level gold-set LABELING (Phase 3 / IR-C, on the frozen corpus)
IR-C experiment RUNS + any real-corpus recall numbers (all TBD)
FtsWriteCursor + Bm25Fts retrieval modes (harness FTS5 SQL)
pinning corpus_hash/qrels_version to a real frozen snapshot (B-1 ruling + freeze)

tests.default_test_build: cargo test -p fathomdb-engine --no-run: BUILD_EXIT=0 (new target does not break the default build)
